goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'english' food and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'mexican' food.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'area'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'park'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve english food and should be in the expensive price range
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves mexican food
Make sure you get address and area
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of park
Make sure you get area and postcode
